name: Maple Walnut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the maple syrup for 10 minutes and pour over stiffly beaten egg whites.
2. Stir until thick, then add sherry and powdered sugar. Stir in chopped walnuts.
3. Press through a pastry tube onto lightly buttered and floured cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes. Makes 5 dozen cookies.
